description: SEV1 incident: Complete order processing pipeline failure. Multiple services down or degraded. You must triage the alerts, diagnose the root cause through careful investigation of logs, metrics, and dependencies, apply the correct remediation, and document the incident.

root_cause.description: order-service v3.3.0 introduced a config change 'order.cache.mode=aggressive' that causes unbounded in-memory cache growth. Under the evening traffic spike, memory grew until OOM killed the service. The crash-looping order-service caused cascading failures to payment-api (can't validate orders) and api-gateway (upstream connection refused).
